contents.label: Eleventh sermon: On the spiritual harvest and the unceasing progeny of the servants of Christ, read during the harvest
Twelfth sermon: On abstinence from ephemeral pleasures
Thirteenth sermon: We ought to preserve the beauty of the unpolluted soul, read during Transfiguration and Repentance
Fifteenth sermon: On the commemoration of St. John Archbishop of Chalcedon
Sixteenth sermon: On the gift of God and his boundless love
Eighteenth sermon: We ought not to give ourselves up to the sufferings of disgrace
Twenty-first sermon: On Christ's concern for us
Twenty-third sermon: On the birth of the Savior
Twenty-fourth sermon: On the migration from this world
